title: SvgFactory
description: AssetFactory implementation that loads SVG markup and produces a rasterised HTMLImageElement. The SVG source text is wrapped in an `image/svg+xml` blob and decoded by the browser's image pipeline, which means the result is a bitmap snapshot at the element's intrinsic size rather than a live, interactive SVG DOM. Use this when you need an SVG as a static sprite or texture source.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: AssetFactory implementation that loads SVG markup and produces a rasterised HTMLImageElement.

The SVG source text is wrapped in an `image/svg+xml` blob and decoded by the browser's image pipeline, which means the result is a bitmap snapshot at the element's intrinsic size rather than a live, interactive SVG DOM. Use this when you need an SVG as a static sprite or texture source.

members.name: create
members.description: Renders the SVG markup into a fully loaded HTMLImageElement. When options.width or options.height are provided, the values are injected into the root element, and revokes the URL once loading settles. Rejects on load error or abort.

members.name: createObjectUrl
members.description: Creates an object URL from blob and registers it for automatic cleanup when destroy is called. Prefer this over calling URL.createObjectURL directly inside a factory subclass so the URL is always tracked.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Revokes every object URL that was created via createObjectUrl and clears the internal tracking pool.

members.name: process
members.description: Reads the response body as UTF-8 text containing the raw SVG markup.

members.name: storageName
members.description: Identifier used as the object-store / storage-namespace key when this factory's assets are persisted to a CacheStore.
